name: Puzzle - LINES AND KNOTS
short_description: Logical puzzle game for meditation. The goal of the player is to assemble a puzzle consisting of nodes. Easy to understand mechanics, swap hexagons with lines.
detailed_description:
Logical puzzle game for meditation. The goal of the player is to assemble a puzzle consisting of nodes. Easy-to-grasp mechanics, swap hexagons with lines.
So I have few players left until Steam allows me to publish collectible cards (for this you need to have a minimum number of players)
▪ 100 Levels
▪ Achievements
